Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with query "Helios" or "CryoShip" or "Osman" (or similar) to find the CryoShip Express cancellation email. Expected findings: email from dispatch@cryoshipexpress.com (email_id email_cryoship_cancellation_yara_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com with subject "Urgent cancellation: Dr. Yara Osman -80°C shipment PHL to SAN" (or similar). The email states CryoShip's only DOT-qualified vehicle for the Philadelphia to San Diego route failed inspection and was placed out of service, so they cannot move the cryogenic clinical trial samples as planned. The April 30 delivery target is no longer supported by CryoShip Express.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails with query "Osman" or "written confirmation" or "Helios" (or similar) to find Dr. Yara Osman's assurance request email. Expected findings: email from yara.osman@heliosbiotech.com (email_id email_helios_yara_written_assurance_request_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, CC nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com and emeka.diallo@moveops.com. Dr. Osman requests written confirmation that the -80°C clinical trial cultures will arrive in San Diego by April 30. She states Dr. Nathan Cross (Lab Director) will not approve sample handoff without that written assurance. She asks for the replacement plan and requests reply-all to include Dr. Cross.
OE 3: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Helios" or "CryoShip" (or similar), or browse #operations channel (C006) using conversations_history with channel_id "C006", to find Fatimah's escalation message and Chloe Vance's reply about the backup carrier. Expected findings: Fatimah's message (ts 1776965700.000000, user moveops_fatimah_alrashidi) in #operations escalating the CryoShip cancellation. Then Chloe Vance's threaded reply (ts 1776966780.000000, user moveops_chloe_vance, thread_ts 1776965700.000000) directing Fatimah to call Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations (greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com) as the best fallback for a specialized lane on short notice. Chloe specifies three questions to ask: whether Swift can support -80°C custody end to end, whether they have a qualified vehicle for the PHL to SAN route, and the earliest pickup they can commit to. Chloe also advises not to promise Helios April 30 in writing until Swift confirms.
OE 4: Search emails using search_emails with query "Tomoko" or "Bouldin" or "UrbanNest" (or similar) to find Carmen Reyes's double-booking notification email. Expected findings: email from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com (email_id email_urbannest_tomoko_bouldin_doublebook_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com with subject "Urgent: Tomoko Ishikawa Austin housing update" (or similar). Carmen reports the confirmed 2BR at The Bouldin is no longer available due to a double-booking on the property side. Two replacement options offered: Option 1 is a furnished 2BR at South Lamar Residences with approximately 25-minute commute to the Pinnacle Dynamics office; Option 2 is a furnished studio at The Bouldin with a $400 per month coworking credit.
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails with query "FedEx" or "Tomoko" or "equipment" (or similar) to find the FedEx delivery notification tied to the original Bouldin address. The agent may also discover this delivery conflict via the Linear ticket comment on issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking (see OE 7), which documents the FedEx shipment details. Expected findings: email (email_id email_tomoko_fedex_equipment_april28_001) showing a FedEx shipment scheduled for delivery on Tuesday April 28 to The Bouldin, 1101 S 1st St, Apt 2418, Austin, TX 78704. Contents include a 3D printer and soldering station. Direct signature is required. This reveals the equipment delivery conflict: if housing switches to South Lamar, the FedEx delivery is going to the wrong address.
OE 6: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with query "Helios" or "Yara Osman" (or similar) to find the Helios Biotech relocation execution ticket. Expected findings: issue (id issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution, number 248, title "Helios Biotech — Dr. Yara Osman relocation execution and cryogenic shipment" or similar) assigned to moveops_fatimah_alrashidi, due_date 2026-04-30, priority 2, team_id team_operations. Description covers the Philadelphia to San Diego relocation scope including -80°C cryogenic shipment with April 30 delivery deadline and May 1 lab start. Then read comments using linear_list_comments with issueId "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution" to find the kickoff checklist, the CryoShip cancellation notice, and the Yara assurance request log.
OE 7: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with query "Tomoko" or "Pinnacle" or "Ishikawa" (or similar) to find the Pinnacle Dynamics relocation tracking ticket. Expected findings: issue (id issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking, number 328, title "Tomoko Ishikawa Relocation Tracking" or similar) assigned to moveops_fatimah_alrashidi, due_date 2026-04-29, team_id team_relocations. Description covers Detroit to Austin relocation, confirmed housing at The Bouldin 2BR, second bedroom required as home workshop for 3D printer and soldering setup, client manager Ryan Gallagher, account manager Mina Hashimoto. Then read comments using linear_list_comments with issueId "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking" to find the Bouldin locked comment and the FedEx equipment shipment note.
OE 8: Search CRM using crm_search_companies with name "Helios" (or similar) to find the Helios Biotech company record. Expected findings: company (id company_helios_biotech, name "Helios Biotech", industry "Biotechnology", Philadelphia PA). Then search CRM contacts using crm_get_contact with id "contact_helios_yara_osman" and "contact_helios_nathan_cross" (or similar) to get Dr. Yara Osman's email (yara.osman@heliosbiotech.com, Senior Clinical Scientist) and Dr. Nathan Cross's email (nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com, Lab Director). Also find the CRM deal (id deal_helios_apr2026_yara_relocation, amount $14,200) and engagements documenting the client intake, estimate, ops handoff, cancellation, and assurance request.
OE 9: Search CRM using crm_search_companies with name "Pinnacle Dynamics" (or similar) to find the Pinnacle Dynamics company record. Expected findings: company (id company_pinnacle_dynamics, name "Pinnacle Dynamics", industry "Industrial Automation", Austin TX). Then get CRM contacts using crm_get_contact with id "crm_contact_ryan_gallagher" (or similar) to find Ryan Gallagher (Engineering Manager, ryan.gallagher@pinnacledynamics.com) as the client-side manager. Also find the CRM deal (id deal_pinnacle_tomoko_austin_relocation_2026, amount $8,900, account manager Mina Hashimoto per description).
OE 10: Search contacts using contacts_search_contacts with query "Greg Pallone" or "Swift" (or similar) to find Greg Pallone's contact information at Swift Relocations. Expected findings: contact record for Greg Pallone with email greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com, Regional Account Director (or similar) at Swift Relocations. This is the backup carrier contact Chloe recommended.
OE 11: Send an email using send_email with sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients ["greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com"], subject referencing the urgent cold-chain transport need for Helios Biotech or Dr. Osman's -80°C shipment PHL to SAN (or similar). The email content should explain the CryoShip cancellation due to DOT inspection failure, describe the shipment requirements (-80°C continuous temperature, Philadelphia to San Diego, April 30 delivery deadline, cryogenic clinical trial cultures), and ask whether Swift can support the temperature requirements, has a qualified vehicle for the route, and what the earliest pickup commitment would be.
OE 12: Reply to Dr. Yara Osman's assurance request email using reply_to_email with email_id "email_helios_yara_written_assurance_request_001", sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", cc ["nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com", "emeka.diallo@moveops.com"] (or similar), since the original email CCs both Nathan Cross and Emeka Diallo and Dr. Osman requests reply-all. The reply content should acknowledge the CryoShip cancellation, confirm the samples are safe and untouched in Philadelphia, explain that a backup carrier (Swift Relocations) has been contacted, and commit to providing the written April 30 delivery guarantee once the replacement carrier confirms capability and availability. The reply should be addressed to both Dr. Osman and Dr. Nathan Cross.
OE 13: Reply to Carmen Reyes's double-booking email using reply_to_email with email_id "email_urbannest_tomoko_bouldin_doublebook_001", sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com" (or similar). The reply content should select the South Lamar Residences 2BR option (Option 1) because Tomoko needs the second bedroom as a dedicated workshop for her 3D printer and soldering station, which the studio option cannot accommodate. The reply should ask Carmen to hold the South Lamar unit immediately and provide the full unit address so the FedEx equipment delivery (currently addressed to The Bouldin) can be redirected before the April 28 delivery attempt.
OE 14: Send an email using send_email with sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients ["ryan.gallagher@pinnacledynamics.com"], subject referencing Tomoko Ishikawa's Austin housing update or the Pinnacle Dynamics relocation (or similar). The email content should notify Ryan Gallagher that the original apartment at The Bouldin is no longer available due to a double-booking, that a replacement 2BR at South Lamar Residences has been selected and a hold requested preserving the workshop space requirement, and that the April 29 move-in date is on track. The email should also mention the equipment delivery is being redirected to the new address.
OE 15: Update the Helios Biotech Linear ticket using linear_create_comment with issueId "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution", body containing a disruption log documenting the CryoShip cancellation (DOT inspection failure, samples untouched), the client escalation (Dr. Osman and Dr. Cross requesting written April 30 guarantee), the backup carrier action (Swift Relocations / Greg Pallone contacted per Chloe's recommendation), and the current status (awaiting Swift confirmation before issuing written guarantee) (or similar). Alternatively, the agent may use linear_update_issue with id "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution" to update the description or priority to reflect the disruption.
OE 16: Update the Pinnacle Dynamics Linear ticket using linear_create_comment with issueId "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking", body containing a disruption log documenting the Bouldin double-booking, the replacement selection (South Lamar 2BR chosen over Bouldin studio because of workshop requirement), the FedEx equipment delivery conflict (shipment going to old Bouldin address, needs redirect before April 28), and the actions taken (Carmen asked to hold South Lamar, Ryan Gallagher notified) (or similar). Alternatively, the agent may use linear_update_issue with id "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking" to update the description.
OE 17: Post a consolidated summary message in the #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006", payload covering both crisis situations. The message should summarize: (1) Helios Biotech situation including CryoShip cancellation, client demand for written delivery assurance, Swift Relocations contacted as backup, awaiting confirmation; (2) Pinnacle Dynamics situation including Bouldin double-booking, South Lamar 2BR selected as replacement, FedEx equipment delivery redirect needed. The summary should give the team visibility on both situations heading into the week.
OE 18: Create a CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids ["company_helios_biotech"], contact_ids ["contact_helios_yara_osman", "contact_helios_nathan_cross"] (or similar), body documenting the CryoShip cancellation, the backup carrier engagement with Swift Relocations, the client communication sent, and the current status of the Helios Biotech relocation crisis (or similar).
OE 19: Create a CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids ["company_pinnacle_dynamics"], contact_ids ["crm_contact_ryan_gallagher"] (or similar), body documenting the Bouldin double-booking disruption, the South Lamar 2BR replacement selection, the FedEx equipment delivery redirect situation, and the client notification sent to Ryan Gallagher (or similar). This logs the Pinnacle Dynamics housing disruption alongside the Helios engagement for operational parity.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with query "Helios" or "CryoShip" or "Osman" (or similar) to find the CryoShip Express cancellation email. Expected findings: email from dispatch@cryoshipexpress.com (email_id email_cryoship_cancellation_yara_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com with subject "Urgent cancellation: Dr. Yara Osman -80°C shipment PHL to SAN" (or similar). The email states CryoShip's only DOT-qualified vehicle for the Philadelphia to San Diego route failed inspection and was placed out of service, so they cannot move the cryogenic clinical trial samples as planned. The April 30 delivery target is no longer supported by CryoShip Express.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails with query "Osman" or "written confirmation" or "Helios" (or similar) to find Dr. Yara Osman's assurance request email. Expected findings: email from yara.osman@heliosbiotech.com (email_id email_helios_yara_written_assurance_request_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, CC nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com and emeka.diallo@moveops.com. Dr. Osman requests written confirmation that the -80°C clinical trial cultures will arrive in San Diego by April 30. She states Dr. Nathan Cross (Lab Director) will not approve sample handoff without that written assurance. She asks for the replacement plan and requests reply-all to include Dr. Cross.
OE 3: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Helios" or "CryoShip" (or similar), or browse #operations channel (C006) using conversations_history with channel_id "C006", to find Fatimah's escalation message and Chloe Vance's reply about the backup carrier. Expected findings: Fatimah's message (ts 1776965700.000000, user moveops_fatimah_alrashidi) in #operations escalating the CryoShip cancellation. Then Chloe Vance's threaded reply (ts 1776966780.000000, user moveops_chloe_vance, thread_ts 1776965700.000000) directing Fatimah to call Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations (greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com) as the best fallback for a specialized lane on short notice. Chloe specifies three questions to ask: whether Swift can support -80°C custody end to end, whether they have a qualified vehicle for the PHL to SAN route, and the earliest pickup they can commit to. Chloe also advises not to promise Helios April 30 in writing until Swift confirms.
OE 4: Search emails using search_emails with query "Tomoko" or "Bouldin" or "UrbanNest" (or similar) to find Carmen Reyes's double-booking notification email. Expected findings: email from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com (email_id email_urbannest_tomoko_bouldin_doublebook_001) to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com with subject "Urgent: Tomoko Ishikawa Austin housing update" (or similar). Carmen reports the confirmed 2BR at The Bouldin is no longer available due to a double-booking on the property side. Two replacement options offered: Option 1 is a furnished 2BR at South Lamar Residences with approximately 25-minute commute to the Pinnacle Dynamics office; Option 2 is a furnished studio at The Bouldin with a $400 per month coworking credit.
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails with query "FedEx" or "Tomoko" or "equipment" (or similar) to find the FedEx delivery notification tied to the original Bouldin address. The agent may also discover this delivery conflict via the Linear ticket comment on issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking (see OE 7), which documents the FedEx shipment details. Expected findings: email (email_id email_tomoko_fedex_equipment_april28_001) showing a FedEx shipment scheduled for delivery on Tuesday April 28 to The Bouldin, 1101 S 1st St, Apt 2418, Austin, TX 78704. Contents include a 3D printer and soldering station. Direct signature is required. This reveals the equipment delivery conflict: if housing switches to South Lamar, the FedEx delivery is going to the wrong address.
OE 6: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with query "Helios" or "Yara Osman" (or similar) to find the Helios Biotech relocation execution ticket. Expected findings: issue (id issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution, number 248, title "Helios Biotech — Dr. Yara Osman relocation execution and cryogenic shipment" or similar) assigned to moveops_fatimah_alrashidi, due_date 2026-04-30, priority 2, team_id team_operations. Description covers the Philadelphia to San Diego relocation scope including -80°C cryogenic shipment with April 30 delivery deadline and May 1 lab start. Then read comments using linear_list_comments with issueId "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution" to find the kickoff checklist, the CryoShip cancellation notice, and the Yara assurance request log.
OE 7: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with query "Tomoko" or "Pinnacle" or "Ishikawa" (or similar) to find the Pinnacle Dynamics relocation tracking ticket. Expected findings: issue (id issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking, number 328, title "Tomoko Ishikawa Relocation Tracking" or similar) assigned to moveops_fatimah_alrashidi, due_date 2026-04-29, team_id team_relocations. Description covers Detroit to Austin relocation, confirmed housing at The Bouldin 2BR, second bedroom required as home workshop for 3D printer and soldering setup, client manager Ryan Gallagher, account manager Mina Hashimoto. Then read comments using linear_list_comments with issueId "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking" to find the Bouldin locked comment and the FedEx equipment shipment note.
OE 8: Search CRM using crm_search_companies with name "Helios" (or similar) to find the Helios Biotech company record. Expected findings: company (id company_helios_biotech, name "Helios Biotech", industry "Biotechnology", Philadelphia PA). Then search CRM contacts using crm_get_contact with id "contact_helios_yara_osman" and "contact_helios_nathan_cross" (or similar) to get Dr. Yara Osman's email (yara.osman@heliosbiotech.com, Senior Clinical Scientist) and Dr. Nathan Cross's email (nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com, Lab Director). Also find the CRM deal (id deal_helios_apr2026_yara_relocation, amount $14,200) and engagements documenting the client intake, estimate, ops handoff, cancellation, and assurance request.
OE 9: Search CRM using crm_search_companies with name "Pinnacle Dynamics" (or similar) to find the Pinnacle Dynamics company record. Expected findings: company (id company_pinnacle_dynamics, name "Pinnacle Dynamics", industry "Industrial Automation", Austin TX). Then get CRM contacts using crm_get_contact with id "crm_contact_ryan_gallagher" (or similar) to find Ryan Gallagher (Engineering Manager, ryan.gallagher@pinnacledynamics.com) as the client-side manager. Also find the CRM deal (id deal_pinnacle_tomoko_austin_relocation_2026, amount $8,900, account manager Mina Hashimoto per description).
OE 10: Search contacts using contacts_search_contacts with query "Greg Pallone" or "Swift" (or similar) to find Greg Pallone's contact information at Swift Relocations. Expected findings: contact record for Greg Pallone with email greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com, Regional Account Director (or similar) at Swift Relocations. This is the backup carrier contact Chloe recommended.
OE 11: Send an email using send_email with sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients ["greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com"], subject referencing the urgent cold-chain transport need for Helios Biotech or Dr. Osman's -80°C shipment PHL to SAN (or similar). The email content should explain the CryoShip cancellation due to DOT inspection failure, describe the shipment requirements (-80°C continuous temperature, Philadelphia to San Diego, April 30 delivery deadline, cryogenic clinical trial cultures), and ask whether Swift can support the temperature requirements, has a qualified vehicle for the route, and what the earliest pickup commitment would be.
OE 12: Reply to Dr. Yara Osman's assurance request email using reply_to_email with email_id "email_helios_yara_written_assurance_request_001", sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", cc ["nathan.cross@heliosbiotech.com", "emeka.diallo@moveops.com"] (or similar), since the original email CCs both Nathan Cross and Emeka Diallo and Dr. Osman requests reply-all. The reply content should acknowledge the CryoShip cancellation, confirm the samples are safe and untouched in Philadelphia, explain that a backup carrier (Swift Relocations) has been contacted, and commit to providing the written April 30 delivery guarantee once the replacement carrier confirms capability and availability. The reply should be addressed to both Dr. Osman and Dr. Nathan Cross.
OE 13: Reply to Carmen Reyes's double-booking email using reply_to_email with email_id "email_urbannest_tomoko_bouldin_doublebook_001", sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com" (or similar). The reply content should select the South Lamar Residences 2BR option (Option 1) because Tomoko needs the second bedroom as a dedicated workshop for her 3D printer and soldering station, which the studio option cannot accommodate. The reply should ask Carmen to hold the South Lamar unit immediately and provide the full unit address so the FedEx equipment delivery (currently addressed to The Bouldin) can be redirected before the April 28 delivery attempt.
OE 14: Send an email using send_email with sender "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients ["ryan.gallagher@pinnacledynamics.com"], subject referencing Tomoko Ishikawa's Austin housing update or the Pinnacle Dynamics relocation (or similar). The email content should notify Ryan Gallagher that the original apartment at The Bouldin is no longer available due to a double-booking, that a replacement 2BR at South Lamar Residences has been selected and a hold requested preserving the workshop space requirement, and that the April 29 move-in date is on track. The email should also mention the equipment delivery is being redirected to the new address.
OE 15: Update the Helios Biotech Linear ticket using linear_create_comment with issueId "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution", body containing a disruption log documenting the CryoShip cancellation (DOT inspection failure, samples untouched), the client escalation (Dr. Osman and Dr. Cross requesting written April 30 guarantee), the backup carrier action (Swift Relocations / Greg Pallone contacted per Chloe's recommendation), and the current status (awaiting Swift confirmation before issuing written guarantee) (or similar). Alternatively, the agent may use linear_update_issue with id "issue_helios_yara_osman_relocation_execution" to update the description or priority to reflect the disruption.
OE 16: Update the Pinnacle Dynamics Linear ticket using linear_create_comment with issueId "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking", body containing a disruption log documenting the Bouldin double-booking, the replacement selection (South Lamar 2BR chosen over Bouldin studio because of workshop requirement), the FedEx equipment delivery conflict (shipment going to old Bouldin address, needs redirect before April 28), and the actions taken (Carmen asked to hold South Lamar, Ryan Gallagher notified) (or similar). Alternatively, the agent may use linear_update_issue with id "issue_pinnacle_ishikawa_relocation_tracking" to update the description.
OE 17: Post a consolidated summary message in the #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006", payload covering both crisis situations. The message should summarize: (1) Helios Biotech situation including CryoShip cancellation, client demand for written delivery assurance, Swift Relocations contacted as backup, awaiting confirmation; (2) Pinnacle Dynamics situation including Bouldin double-booking, South Lamar 2BR selected as replacement, FedEx equipment delivery redirect needed. The summary should give the team visibility on both situations heading into the week.
OE 18: Create a CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids ["company_helios_biotech"], contact_ids ["contact_helios_yara_osman", "contact_helios_nathan_cross"] (or similar), body documenting the CryoShip cancellation, the backup carrier engagement with Swift Relocations, the client communication sent, and the current status of the Helios Biotech relocation crisis (or similar).
OE 19: Create a CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids ["company_pinnacle_dynamics"], contact_ids ["crm_contact_ryan_gallagher"] (or similar), body documenting the Bouldin double-booking disruption, the South Lamar 2BR replacement selection, the FedEx equipment delivery redirect situation, and the client notification sent to Ryan Gallagher (or similar). This logs the Pinnacle Dynamics housing disruption alongside the Helios engagement for operational parity.

query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%

The search surfaced the exact message from the operations channel containing Greg Pallone's contact and the three qualifying questions Chloe specified.

Earlier, Tool Call 28 also searched by filter_users_from 'moveops_chloe_vance' to locate this message.
